delivery.raw: 主に対面（全開講回数の過半数）、一部オンライン

rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: Enjoy improving your English conversation/communication ability discussing weekly topics in groups.
aims:
Have fun improving your English conversation/communication ability discussing current weekly topics.
The aim is that students improve general communicative competence and learn to apply this productively and receptively in authentic spoken interactions.
goals: Class orientation & making unique & Interesting self-introductions

Talking about the traditional/changing roles of teachers & students in the classroom
Differences/similarities
SDGs quality education/share your energy/partnership to achieve goals/peace,justice,strong institutions

Learning from Home & Neighborhood
Different learning experiences / influences
SDGs sustainable urban development

Communicative & Traditional Teaching
Differences in Descriptions & Appearances
Using AI for teaching
SDGs gender equality/reduce inequality
Making/Talking about how interesting your daily schedule is

Discussing Topics of interest
Immediate surroundings: the country you live in/the world we live in
What influences us: How?/ Why?
SDGs sustainable urban development/partnership to achieve goals/peace, justice, strong institutions

What Happened? : Explaining Past Events
using sequencing & past tense verbs
[How to improve past experience/classroom lessons]

Talking about your interest in food: buying/ preparing/ eating
How can we use food to enhance classroom lessons?
SDGs responsible consumption & production/zero hunger/good health/safe water

Talking about your likes & dislikes of places you & other classmates have visited/want to visit
Similarities/differences

Talking about the good/bad effects of the mass media/social media/AI
How does AI/social & mass media affect the way we think & learn?
SDGs gender equality/reduce inequality

Future Plans & Globalization
Talking about your future plans using languages ​​
How have other cultures/people influenced your native language & your future?
SDGs gender equality/reduce inequality/partnership to achieve goals

Talking about a current topic or problem of interest to you
What can we do to get students/young people more involved (in improving the world)?
SDGs gender equality/reduce inequality/partnership to achieve goals

textbooks: Original class materials will be posted on the KU moodle site [https://moodle.kochi-u.ac.jp/2026/] or handed out in class.
prereq:
Successful completion of basic general education Eikaiwa I & II (speaking/conversation) as a 1st-year student at Kochi University.
The course is taught in English at a Post Elementary level. It is assumed that students have some basic English communication skills, so students must be ready to try to function in English and improve on their basic conversation and listening skills.
prep:
Students are expected to practice English skills and prepare for all classes.
Practice outside of the classroom is essential.
At least 30~45 minutes are needed weekly to review, practice & prepare for each class at home.
To improve your English ability to a higher level, 3~4 hours weekly of study at home is recommended.
Try practicing English at home or outside of class for at least 5~10 minutes daily to make an improvement.
teachers: ◎ フェビアン ポーラ ダイアン

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－中学校・高校（英語）：英語コミュニケーション

extra.label: 【テーマ（英語）】(IN ENGLISH)
extra.text:
Keep a conversation/discussion going using interesting topics as well as good pronunciation & grammar.
Enjoy communicating in English.

extra.label: この授業で身につける「10+1の能力」
extra.text:

論理的思考力

語学に関するリテラシー
情報に関するリテラシー
表現力
コミュニケーション力
協働実践力
自律力
倫理観
統合・働きかけ

extra.label:
履修に係わる注意事項
【NOTES ON CLASS ENROLLMENT】
extra.text:
It is very important to ATTEND class regularly (maximum 3 absences), especially the 1st lesson introduction.
Students are expected to ACTIVELY PARTICIPATE in every class.

extra.label: 成績評価に関する補足
extra.text:
30% In-class work/Participation + 25% Homework/Preparation [moodle]
20% MIDTERM Group Exam PRESENTATION
25% Final Group EXAM PRESENTATION

extra.label: 教員の実務経験の有無
extra.text:
有
教員の実務経験との関連
Have worked as a teacher; teaching in kindergarten, elementary school NPO summer programs, junior & senior high school, vocational schools, cram schools, language schools & university. Before teaching, I worked for a small company in public relations/marketing & advertising. Over the years have volunteered or worked in/with NPO groups.

extra.label: 授業形態
extra.text:
講義形式が中心
口頭での質疑やディスカッションを含む
授業中や授業時間外のグループワークを含む
その他
Some classes will meet online or on demand on moodle
